scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:docs
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w mdx-handwritten-scene && npm run build -w remark-mdx-handwritten && npm run build -w mdx-handwritten-react
scripts.build:release-fixtures: npm run build:packages && vite build --config tests/visual/vite.config.ts
scripts.check:release: npm run check && npm run test:release-fixtures
scripts.test:release-fixtures: npm run typecheck:release-fixtures && npm run build:release-fixtures && playwright test --config tests/visual/playwright.config.ts
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run check:budgets && npm run build:docs
